title: Pink & White Wafers 85G, Pack Of 4, Delightful crunchy wafers filled with pink 'n' white mallow, 50 calories
features: PACK CONTENTS: Four packs of delightful Pink & White Wafers, each containing 6 wafers and weighing 85g per pack
LOW CALORIE TREAT: Only 50 calories per serving, making it a perfect guilt-free snack for conscious consumers
TEXTURE COMBINATION: Satisfyingly crunchy wafers filled with smooth pink and white mallow creating a delightful taste experience
PORTION CONTROL: Individual packs are perfectly portioned for easy snacking and maintaining freshness
SERVING SIZE: Convenient 85g packs that are ideal for sharing or storing for multiple snacking occasions
description: Product description Indulge in the delightful world of Love Mallow's Pink 'n' Whites wafers, where every bite is a perfect harmony of crunch and lightness. Each pack contains 6 exquisitely crafted wafers filled with a heavenly pink and white mallow cream, creating a delectable treat that's surprisingly only 50 calories per serving. This multipack of 4 (85g each) ensures you'll always have these scrumptious snacks on hand. The crisp, delicate wafer layers sandwich the smooth, sweet mallow filling, offering a satisfying texture contrast that makes these treats simply irresistible. Perfect for afternoon tea, lunchbox treats, or whenever you fancy a light, sweet nibble. These wafers strike the ideal balance between indulgence and portion control, making them a smart choice for conscious snacking without compromising on taste. Ingredients Fortified Wheat Flour (Wheat Flour, Calcium, Iron, Niacin and Thiamin), Sugar, Glucose Syrup, Invert Sugar, Gelatine, Soya Flour, Natural Colour (Beetroot), Sunflower Oil, Salt, Emulsifier (Soya Lecithin), Raising Agent (Sodium Bicarbonate), Skimmed Milk Powder, Natural Vanilla Flavour, Natural Colour (Annatto), Cornflour
